dataset_name: Yield Trends and Changes for Maize, Soybean, Rice, and Wheat
data_products: Categorical bins representing different yield trends (2012) (Represented by data with categorical in the title.), Rate of yield change (percent/year) (2013), (Represented by data with percentage in the title)
resolution: Spatial: Five minute by five minute resolution (~10km x 10km at equator)
citation: Ray DK, N Ramankutty, ND Mueller, PC West, JA Foley. 2012. Recent patterns of crop yield growth, stagnation, and collapse. Nature Communications. 3:1293 doi: 10.1038/ncomms2296, Ray DK, ND Mueller, PC West, JA Foley. 2013. Yield trends are insufficient to double global crop production by 2050. Public Library of Science – ONE. doi: 10.1371/journal.pone.006642

resolution: Geotiff: Five-arc-minute by five-arc-minute resolution (~10km x 10km at equator), Shapefile contains 15,084 feature basins. Basins of area smaller than 1,000 km2 were omitted from this study, and are not included.
citation: Brauman, KA, BD Richter, S Postel, M Malby, M Flörke. (2016) “Water Depletion: An improved metric for incorporating seasonal and dry-year water scarcity into water risk assessments.” Elementa: Science of the Anthropocene. Doi: http://doi.org/10.12952/journal.elementa.000083

dataset_name: Yield Gaps and Climate Bins for Major Crops
data_products: Yield Gaps – tons per hectare gap, Potential or attainable yields – tons per hectare, Climate Bins – defined by precipitation and growing degree days in crop area
resolution: Spatial: Five minute by five minute resolution (~10km x 10km at equator), Temporal: Year 2000 – Average of census data between 1997-2003
citation: Mueller, N. D., Gerber, J. S., Johnston, M., Ray, D. K., Ramankutty, N., & Foley, J. A. (2012). Closing yield gaps through nutrient and water management. Nature, 490, 254. doc: 10.1038/nature11420

data_products: Nitrogen fertilizer, manure, and atmospheric deposition application rate in kilograms N per hectare, Total nitrogen fertilizer, manure, and atmospheric deposition applied on landscape in kilograms, Phosphorus fertilizer and manure application rate in kilograms P2O5 per hectare, Total phosphorus fertilizer and manure applied on landscape in kilograms P2O5 per hectare, Potassium fertilizer and manure application rate in kilograms K2O per hectare, Total potassium fertilizer and manure applied on landscape in kilograms K2O per hectare, Data quality layers for nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium
resolution: Spatial: Five minute by five minute resolution (~10km x 10km at equator), Temporal: Data represents the year 2000 largely as a collection of data from 1999, 2000. Data for some countries is as old as 1994 or as recent as 2001. See table below.
citation: Mueller, ND, JS Gerber, M Johnston, DK Ray, N Ramankutty, and JA Foley. 2012. Closing yield gaps through nutrient and water management. Nature doi: 10.1038/nature11420. 490:254-257., West, PC, JS Gerber, ND Mueller, KA Brauman, KM Carlson, ES Cassidy, PM Engstrom, M Johnston, GK MacDonald, DK Ray, and S Siebert. 2014. Leverage points for improving food security and the environment. Science. 345:325-328. doi: 10.1126/science.1246067.
